name: taproot
description: Root-cause guard mode for AI bug fixes. Blocks symptom patches and test overfitting.

interface.longDescription: Forces agents to reproduce, trace the first wrong state, fix at the invariant owner, and leave a regression guard instead of quickfixing symptoms.
defaultPrompt: Use Taproot mode for this bug fix.
Find the first wrong state before patching.
Review this diff for symptom patches and test overfitting.
